350.reason: [This causes a single '&' to be returned as a match for the AND pattern, which leads TokenLexer to treat it as an error. However, this logic is flawed because it returns "&" even when the current tokenType is not AND, causing incorrect early matching and error reporting.]

However, this logic is flawed because it returns "&" even when the current tokenType is not AND, causing incorrect early matching and error reporting.]

353.reason: [Same issue as above: returning "|" for OR pattern match attempt causes incorrect error triggering even when scanning for other token types.]
